title: Cogniauxiocharis glazioviana
taxonomy: Cogniauxiocharis glazioviana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Cogniauxiocharis. The classification of Cogniauxiocharis glazioviana further breaks down into the kingdom Plantae, followed by the division Magnoliophyta and class Magnoliopsida. The order Gentianales is also a part of its classification, along with the family Apocynaceae. This species is further identified by its unique combination of characteristics and genetic makeup.
